reviews.review_msg: Extremely disorganized teaching style. While he is highly regarded in his field, his ability to convey material is hindered by frequent, inappropriate remarks that are entirely unrelated. Grading is inconsistent and lacks constructive feedback.
this class is hard, but hes an awesome prof. highly recommend. he is basically a stand up comedian.
Amazing Prof. Very clear about what he wanted and was a straight-forward marker. Loved this class. It was definitely a lot of work but it was a great experience.
